backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all core types (Ingredient, Recipe, Customer, Subscription, Invoice, Plan) and business logic for a salad subscription management app, with access control and migration support.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that defines old and new actor state shapes and a `run` function that converts `inventoryAdjustments` from `List.List` to arrays during canister upgrade.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking three implemented features (IngredientForm mutation wiring, useQueries.ts backend hooks, and Layout routing preservation) to their relevant files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated summary document describing the purpose and key implementation details of each frontend source file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, primary, chart, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Salad Khatora app, mounting the React app into a `#root` div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all page routes (Dashboard, Inventory, Menu, Sales, Subscriptions, Customers, Plans, Login) under a shared layout, wrapped with QueryClient, AuthProvider, and ThemeProvider.
frontend/src/components/CustomerDetailsD: A dialog component that displays detailed information for a single customer, including contact info, address, and purchase history (order count and total spent) derived from filtered invoices.
frontend/src/components/CustomerForm.tsx: A form component for creating or updating a customer, handling fields like name, mobile, email, address, and preferences, with validation via react-hook-form and mutations via custom hooks.
frontend/src/components/CustomerList.tsx: Renders a responsive grid of customer cards showing contact details and order stats, with edit and delete actions per customer.
Displays a collapsible list of delivery days for a subscription, allowing toggling of each day's status (pending/delivered/missed) with summary counts shown in the header.
frontend/src/components/IngredientForm.t: A form component for creating or updating an ingredient, with fields for name, quantity, unit, cost price, supplier, and low-stock threshold, using react-hook-form and custom mutation hooks.
frontend/src/components/IngredientList.t: Renders a responsive grid of ingredient cards showing quantity, cost, supplier, and threshold, with low-stock highlighting and edit/delete actions.
frontend/src/components/InventoryAdjustm: A placeholder component that displays an informational message indicating inventory adjustment history is not yet available, since the backend no longer exposes those endpoints.
frontend/src/components/InvoiceDetailsDi: A modal dialog that displays full details of a single invoice, including customer info, date, payment mode, line items with recipe names, and a cost summary with discount and total.
frontend/src/components/InvoiceForm.tsx: A form component for creating a new invoice, allowing selection of customer, date, payment mode, discount, and dynamic line items (recipe + quantity + unit price), then submitting via the createInvoice mutation.
frontend/src/components/InvoiceList.tsx: Renders a searchable grid of invoice cards showing invoice ID, customer name, payment mode badge, date, item count, discount, and total amount.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: The main application shell providing a sticky header with logo, desktop and mobile navigation, a notification bell, and login/logout controls, rendering child routes via an Outlet.
frontend/src/components/NotificationPane: A popover notification bell that aggregates and displays low-stock ingredient alerts and expiring subscription alerts with counts and details.
frontend/src/components/PlanForm.tsx: A form for creating or editing a subscription plan, capturing name, plan price, bowl size, and bowl price, then calling the appropriate create or update mutation.
frontend/src/components/PlanList.tsx: Renders a responsive grid of subscription plan cards with enrollment counts, and provides edit and delete actions for each plan.
frontend/src/components/RecipeForm.tsx: Form component for creating or updating a salad recipe, including dynamic ingredient entries with quantity and unit selection.
frontend/src/components/RecipeList.tsx: Displays a grid of recipe cards showing bowl size and ingredients, with edit and delete actions for each recipe.
frontend/src/components/RevenueChart.tsx: Bar chart component that visualizes revenue trends over the last 7 or 30 days, toggled via buttons, using sales analytics data.
frontend/src/components/SalesAnalyticsCa: Renders summary cards for daily/monthly revenue, total and repeat customers, and a ranked list of top-selling items.
frontend/src/components/SubscriptionForm: Form for creating or editing a customer subscription, auto-filling price and bowl size from the selected plan and computing an end date.
frontend/src/components/SubscriptionList: Renders a grid of subscription cards with customer/plan names, payment status badges, dates, and edit/delete actions using React Query mutations.
frontend/src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx: Provides an AuthContext wrapping Internet Identity login/logout state, exposing isAuthenticated, principal, and loading flags to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) via React Query, reinitializing dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity auth provider and hook using DFINITY AuthClient, managing login/logout state and persisting identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useNotifications.ts: Generates and persists in-state notifications for low-stock ingredients and expiring subscriptions, with markAsRead and dismiss helpers.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for CRUD operations on ingredients, customers, subscriptions, invoices, recipes, plans, and user profiles against the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useSalesAnalytics.ts: Computes aggregated sales analytics (total/daily/monthly revenue, top items, payment distribution, trends) from invoice data using useMemo.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/CustomersPage.tsx: Page component for managing customers, displaying a list with add/edit functionality via a dialog-based form.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Dashboard overview page showing stats cards for customers, subscriptions, ingredients, and revenue, plus low stock alerts and recent activity.
frontend/src/pages/InventoryPage.tsx: Page component for managing ingredients/inventory, with a list view and dialog form for adding or editing ingredients.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page that redirects authenticated users and provides an Internet Identity sign-in button.
frontend/src/pages/MenuPage.tsx: Page component for managing salad recipes, with a list view and dialog form for adding or editing recipes.
frontend/src/pages/PlansPage.tsx: Page component for managing subscription plans, showing enrollment counts per plan and a dialog form for add/edit.
frontend/src/pages/SalesPage.tsx: Sales page displaying invoices with total revenue summary and a dialog form for creating new invoices.
frontend/src/pages/SubscriptionsPage.tsx: Page component for managing customer subscriptions, showing active count and a dialog form for add/edit.
frontend/src/types.ts: Central type definitions file that re-exports backend types and local query types, and defines auxiliary types like BowlSize, PaymentMode, and stub inventory types.
frontend/src/utils/csvExport.ts: Utility function that converts an array of objects to a CSV file and triggers a browser download.
frontend/src/utils/dateCalculations.ts: Provides utility functions for subscription date calculations, including computing end dates, adding/subtracting delivery days, and generating delivery day ranges — all skipping Sundays.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence helpers for maintaining values like admin tokens across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based colors, border radii, fonts, shadows, and accordion animations, using the typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of the meal delivery subscription management app, including architectural notes, known issues, existing features, and pending feature requests for backend stable storage, CRUD endpoints, and frontend data wiring.
